name: Martha's Buckeyes (Chocolate Covered Peanut Butter Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients with hands until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into balls and chill.
3. Melt 1/4 stick of paraffin in a double boiler.
4. Add 1 package of chocolate chips to the melted paraffin and melt together.
5. Using a small fork, dip each chilled ball into the chocolate mixture, leaving about a dime-sized area uncovered.
6. Let the dipped balls harden on waxed paper.
Note: Ensure all steps are completed while the mixture is still cool to prevent melting the chocolate.
